channel.title: Tips_Tricks on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Tips_Tricks on Tech Tracker

item.title: Best Battery Tips & Tricks For Android - 2020
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-YtrGiIzYlac/XoIeRVRLvfI/AAAAAAAABTI/NI1Krc-0G243mMDcgFLV2xp_-BTKpNdsACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/IMG_20200111_105332_780-02-24.jpeg" alt=""> Battery of smartphones getting bigger day by day and even getting chargers that can charge phone in less than 30min so what about old smartphones and you are heavy user then these battery tips definitely useful. - Battery Saving Tips / Tricks - • Put the apps in hibernating mode so that the apps will not use external resources that do effect your battery getting drained you can easily do that installing greenify app •

item.title: Tips & Tricks For Youtube
item.description: ****<img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-TuuR1Pn7Tx8/XjVf7CWB7fI/AAAAAAAABA0/cJlmxnAi0oshxv8HQ1kb-4en6oiTAubpgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1580556262822235-0.png" alt=""> ** Hi**, do you likely to start a youtube channel or to improvise then wait read our tips & trips and make a wonderful youtube channels in very less time. It is useful to share your content and knowledge using YouTube throught out the world, but there are alot of channel and get views and subscribers there is alot of things that you need to keep in mind and improvise your channel accrording to it.

item.title: Useful Tips & Tricks For Seo
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-BcKcSIpQYLg/XhTUxmrjLOI/AAAAAAAAAp4/0Ah8z4qFdXcfy0E42qzjetigjvwpkWf3wCLcBGAsYHQ/s16000/IMG_20200108_002535_811.jpg" alt=""> If you are starting a website or you are completely new to these website things, there are so many ways to build a complete and today it become to easy with the available resources we have and everybody can make a site and live up in min with free cme system from trusted global companies. Even with the easyness the competition become really as daily lakhs of pages created daily as it’s become very hard if you wrote an article about something’s and its appear in google or any other

item.title: 10 ways to improve browsing speed in smartphone
